message:
perf: Optimize splitter + inline encoding (still 33x slower)

Optimizations added:
1. @setRuntimeSafety(false) everywhere
2. ASCII fast-path in splitter (95% of text)
3. Inline encoding to avoid 30k allocations
4. Direct vocab lookup for tiny chunks (<10 bytes)
5. comptime CONTRACTIONS array

Results:
- Correctness: 594/594 (100%) ✅
- Speed: 14.9s vs rs-bpe 446ms (33.3x slower) ❌

Root cause: Still using HashMap encoder O(n²) on 30k chunks
- Chunks avg 6.7 bytes (30k chunks for 200KB)
- Each chunk: O(n²) merging with array shifting
- Total: 30k × O(n²) = very slow

Need: rs-bpe's backtracking encoder (O(n) per chunk)
- Requires: Aho-Corasick OR working with small chunks
- Next: Try backtracking encoder now that chunks are small
